hero.title:
Gastronomy,
Culture,
Evolution
hero.subtitle: We transform culinary talent into experiences that transcend.

whoWeAre.intro: Itibá is a culinary and cultural platform born from the Caribbean to rethink gastronomy with identity, method, and a vision for the future. It is rooted in deep respect for local produce, origin cooking, and the people who sustain it —producers, cooks, communities— while working with discipline, structure, and international standards.
whoWeAre.connector: Itibá connects three things that are almost never worked on together

pillars.name: Identity
pillars.description: Our own, without folklore, without disguise, without losing truth.

pillars.name: Operation
pillars.description: Clear processes, real costs, a kitchen that can grow and sustain itself.

pillars.name: Impact
pillars.description: Training, value chain, and conscious use of the territory.

divider.intro: Gastronomía. Territorio. Evolución.  Creamos ideas con lenguaje, dirección y presencia.

origin.title: Origin
origin.intro: Itibá is a creative and gastronomic agency that develops contemporary concepts, experiences, and narratives at the intersection of creative direction, gastronomy, hospitality, territory, and evolution, rooted in the Caribbean and in dialogue with Latin America.
origin.supportText: We create ideas with language, direction, and presence.
origin.blockTitle: An agency that creates from territory and thinks for the present.
origin.blockText1: Itibá operates at the intersection of creative direction, narrative, gastronomy, and experience. It develops concepts that take shape through activations, events, consulting, collaborations, and platforms with a distinct identity.
origin.blockText2: Its perspective begins in the Caribbean but is not limited to it. It works from a Caribbean and Latin American sensibility, open to dialogue between memory, contemporaneity, hospitality, and brand.
origin.projectDesc: An experience where territory, gastronomy, creative direction, and visual language came together in a shared narrative.
origin.clientsText: Itibá collaborates with brands, institutions, hospitality spaces, and cultural allies.

vision.title: Vision
vision.intro: We don’t start from empty formats. We start from ideas with direction.
vision.visionText: At Itibá, vision brings together what we do, how we think, and how it takes form. It is where concept, hospitality, gastronomy, and evolution become practice.

creative.title: Creative direction & concept
creative.text: We develop foundational concepts, narratives, and creative universes for brands and projects that require a clear identity.
creative.applications: naming, core idea, manifesto, tone, conceptual language, editorial direction, and creative structure.

events.title: Events · experiences · pop-ups
events.text: We design and produce gastronomic, cultural, and brand experiences with a defined conceptual logic.
events.applications: special dinners, brand activations, launches, immersive experiences, and large-scale events.

consulting.title: Gastronomic & cultural consulting
consulting.text: We design and structure proposals integrating concept, gastronomy, and hospitality into projects with identity and coherence.
consulting.applications: gastronomic concept • territorial narrative • experience design • project structuring.

education.title: Education & labs
education.text: We create programs and workshops to strengthen capabilities in the gastronomic sector.
education.applications: hospitality training, culinary creativity, sustainability, and specialized education.

alliances.title: Alliances & integrated experiences
alliances.text: We connect brands, content, and hospitality into meaningful collaborations.
alliances.applications: strategic alliances, brand integrations, experiential content, and hybrid formats.

vision.thinking: Creativity at Itibá is not an isolated aesthetic resource. It is a way of observing, connecting, and building meaning.

about.intro: Itibá develops concepts, experiences, and strategies rooted in territory, memory, and contemporary transformation. It operates at the intersection of narrative, hospitality, and gastronomy to build projects with identity, depth, and a genuine capacity for connection.
about.title: Agency
about.heroText: An agency where gastronomy, creative direction, and evolution work together.
about.heroDesc1: Itibá is a creative and gastronomic agency that develops concepts, experiences, and strategies rooted in territory, memory, and contemporary transformation.
about.heroDesc2: It operates at the intersection of narrative, hospitality, and gastronomy to build projects with identity, depth, and a genuine capacity for connection.
about.visionText: We think from the Caribbean, in dialogue with Latin America. This means working with roots, but without static nostalgia; with identity, but without empty folklore; with cultural sensitivity, but also with a contemporary vision.
about.processText: Every project begins with a fundamental question: what needs to take shape, what language can sustain it, and what experience can make it memorable. From there, we articulate concept, narrative, creative direction, experience, and execution.
about.driveText: We are driven by the possibility of transforming memory into language, territory into experience, and intuition into structure. We are interested in creating projects with beauty, yes—but also with thought, intention, and the ability to leave a mark.

members.name: Dayanny De La Cruz
members.title: Chief Executive Officer (CEO)
members.description: Executive Leadership, Culinary Architecture, and Social Impact Vision.
members.quote: Gastronomy is the most honest language that exists.

members.name: Noelia Caccavelli
members.title: Chief Creative Officer (CCO)
members.description: Brand Creative Vision, Storytelling, and Foundational Concept Development
members.quote: Every brand has a story that deserves to be told with precision.
